sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42465" key="e)rikte/anos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρικτέᾰνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wealthy,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:312" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.312</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
